steps.t: Dáin can be found just outside Muru Azog at Azanulbizar. Azog has been slain at last, but victory was won at great cost. You should talk to Dáin.
King Thráin can be found just outside Muru Azog at Azanulbizar. Azog has been slain at last, but Dáin has fallen silent. You should talk to King Thrái…
